series_metadata.series_title: Underground Storage Tank Permits and Per
series_metadata.series_description: Document contains the name and location of underground storage tanks which are scheduled for removal; repair; new installation; and upgrade. Specific documents are permit application forms; permit forms; and inspection forms.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Update and maintain these records on the PC Network Revelation computer system permanently ; Microform: Retain updated master in off site storage permanently. Retain updated master diazo in operating area permanently ; Paper: Microfilm hard copy records on an annual basis. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy hard copy records, Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Wastepaper ; Paper: Wastepaper
